# 多源机场节点配置编辑器 (Clash Node Editor)

> A free, browser-based tool for merging multiple Clash / Mihomo proxy subscription sources, managing proxy groups, and exporting complete Clash Meta configuration files.

## What this tool does

- **Subscription Source Manager**: Add multiple airport (proxy provider) subscription URLs or upload local YAML files. Fetches and parses proxies from each source via a privacy-preserving Vercel Edge Function proxy — no third-party services involved.
- **Proxy Group Editor**: Visually configure proxy groups (select, url-test, fallback, load-balance, relay). Drag-and-drop node ordering, batch add/remove, IP quality detection.
- **Rule Set Manager**: Manage rule providers (HTTP-based YAML rule sets), configure per-service routing targets. Includes one-click AI service rules (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Copilot).
- **Config Preview & Export**: Generate a complete Clash Meta / Mihomo YAML configuration. Edit DNS settings, tuning parameters, copy to clipboard or download as file.

## Key features

- All data processed locally in the browser — no server-side storage
- Supports Clash Meta / Mihomo compatible configuration format
- Prefix-based deduplication for nodes and proxy groups across sources
- User-Agent spoofing to retrieve subscription in correct format
- IP geolocation quality check per node (residential / datacenter / VPN detection)
- Dark mode support

## Technical stack

- React + TypeScript + Vite
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Deployed on Vercel (Edge Functions for subscription proxying)
- State managed with Zustand + localStorage persistence

## Use cases

1. Users with multiple proxy provider (airport) subscriptions who want a unified Clash config
2. Users who need to customize proxy groups beyond what their airport provides
3. Advanced users configuring split-tunneling rules for specific services (AI tools, streaming, etc.)

## URL

https://clashnodeeditor.vercel.app/
